content:
# Magneticresonanceimaging

**Summary**: A non-destructive imaging technique used to visualize and quantify fluid distribution in porous media.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-ahmed|Ahmed, 2023]] utilized MRI techniques to visualize the in-situ wettability dynamics, recovery mechanisms, and dynamic interfacial tension.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The T2 distribution was utilized to quantify the oil in the rock, and the fast spin echo (FSE) was employed to visualize the fluid occupancy in 2D. ([[2023-ahmed|Ahmed, 2023, p. 152]])
